params.name: Africa Star
params.source:
* Britland Treasure Maps (0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (810k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Nov 3, 1905, South Africa presented this diamond as a gift to King Edward VII. The Africa Star is an unparalleled treasure that was presented as a gift to King Edward VII, and was later placed on the solemn and ravishing crown of the British Empire. [Rough diamond Cullinan] Cullinan I: Pear-shaped, weighing 530.2 carats, placed in the Sovereign's Sceptre
Cullinan II: Square, weighing 317.4 carats. Set in the Crown
Cullinan III: Pear-shaped, weighing 94.4 carats. Set in the Crown
C …
